name: Multiple-choice quiz
description: Questions with one correct answer and misconception-targeting distractors. Best for checking factual recall and concept understanding.

name: Matching / memory
description: Match terms to definitions, events to dates, or causes to effects. Best for relating paired concepts.

name: Fill in the blank
description: Complete sentences by choosing the missing word(s). Best for key terminology in context.

name: Timeline ordering
description: Arrange events or steps in the correct order. Best for chronology and processes.

name: Crossword
description: Clue-driven word grid. Best for vocabulary-rich topics.

name: Character guess
description: Guess a person/figure from progressive clues. Best for historical or notable figures.
